title: Ascend Fruit
description: Ascend up terrain like in Zelda using this new type of chorus fruit.
body:
# Ascend Fruit This mod introduces the ascend fruit, a very useful item which lets you teleport through terrain to the top. Inspired by the ascend ability from _The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom_, it's perfect for quickly exiting a cave while mining. However, you can also use it to traverse up mountains, go to the next floor in your base, or many other ways. ## How it works 1. Eat the Ascend Fruit near a ceiling 2. Teleport to the nearest open space above you
Usage video
![A looping gif animation of a player walking towards a cliff, eating the ascend fruit teleporting up and walking off screen](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Pesopes/ascend-fruit-mod/main/promo/usage_square.webp) ## Crafting To craft it place a wind charge at the top in a brewing stand and chorus fruit at the bottom and it will change into the ascend fruit. ## Some notes: - Teleporting onto liquids is currently not possible. If there's an ocean above you the teleport will fail. _I might change this in the future._ - You have to be close to the ceiling (withing 7 air blocks) to teleport. The destination has to be 2 blocks high. - Teleporting may fail for other reasons, but your fruit **won't be consumed** whenever it fails to teleport you. ## Support the mod Thanks for at least reading this description. This is my first Minecraft mod, and I'm learning as I go. If you found this mod useful, consider giving a tip.
